content.text:
I'm not -- I mean, scared is a strong word. I'm just... there's a lot riding on it. It's my first big thing in this role and I want to do it well, that's normal. It's not like I'm scared, I'm just... prepared. Or trying to be. Which is why I need to figure out the prep schedule.

I don't really have time to be scared, honestly. If I stop and think about it too much I'll just spiral and then nothing gets done. So. The deck. Can we --
